nasb.text: You shall mark a way for the sword to come to Rabbah of the sons of Ammon, and to Judah into fortified Jerusalem.

esv.text: Mark a way for the sword to come to Rabbah of the Ammonites and to Judah, into Jerusalem the fortified.

cnv.text: 你要定出一條路，使刀臨到亞捫的拉巴，又要定出另一條路，使刀臨到猶大，攻擊堅固城耶路撒冷。

ccb.text: 一条路通往亚扪的拉巴城，一条路通往犹大的坚城耶路撒冷。
